project_type: Next.js 16 app with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, server actions
test_framework: No test framework configured in package.json
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to confirm TypeScript compiles and Next.js builds successfully. Run npm run lint to check for lint errors.
environment_constraints: AGENTS.md warns that this is a newer version of Next.js with breaking changes - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for relevant guides before writing code.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and ensure Semantic HTML is used for all layout sections (from steering file).
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive with useTransition for server action calls. Server actions are in lib/actions.ts. The confirmMedicationIntake action already exists and takes (medicationId, medicationName, scheduledTime) parameters.
directory_structure: app/ contains pages and components, lib/ contains actions, types, db, auth utilities
